title: Faecal transplant makes the brains of old mice act young again
description: Older mice that received a faecal microbiome transplant from younger animals went on to have improved brain plasticity, which meant their brains could overcome a neurological condition that is typically successfully treated only in childhood
author: Chris Simms

title: We've found a mysterious substance on Titan and Pluto
description: Something is absorbing light on the surfaces of Pluto and Saturn’s moon Titan, and figuring out what it is could be crucial to understanding Titan’s complex chemistry
author: Leah Crane

title: Most portable air conditioners suck – but there's an easy fix
description: Efficiency ratings on portable air conditioners don’t give consumers the full picture, and one type of aircon unit is so inefficient that it should be banned, says Michael Le Page
author: Michael Le Page

title: Gas from Uranus reveals it has an icy centre
description: Carbon monoxide in Uranus's deep atmosphere indicates that the planet contains more ice than rock, suggesting it formed more like Neptune than we thought
author: Alex Wilkins

title: Remarkable fossils rewrite the story of how animals conquered the land
description: Palaeontologists have found new evidence that the early ancestors of amphibians, reptiles and mammals did not have a larval stage with external gills like modern frogs or salamanders
author: James Woodford

title: Almost the whole of Japan moved eastward after 2011 earthquake
description: An extremely unusual tectonic movement took place 15 minutes after the Tohoku earthquake in 2011, causing almost the whole of Japan to move 5 millimetres to the east
author: James Woodford
